get.description: Return backend health only when PostgreSQL is reachable.
Return application version and runtime metadata.
Return a small payload without touching the database.

post.description:
Verify credentials and set the session cookie.

Tries app-local users first, then falls back to Xano credentials so Tillin
users can sign in with their Xano identifiers.

A LOCAL success still tries the same credentials against Xano (best
effort): when they match — the normal case for a Tillin user who also has
a local password — we capture a fresh user token and company binding, so
their catalog calls are company-scoped instead of falling back to the
service identity. A mismatch changes nothing.
Clear the session cookie.

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Change the signed-in user's local password (current one required).

get.description: Return a page of canonical products matching the search + filters.

parameters.name: ecommerce

schema.description: Connexion e-commerce (natif Xano) : 1 tous, 2 connectés, 3 partiellement connectés, 4 non connectés
schema.title: Ecommerce

parameters.description: Connexion e-commerce (natif Xano) : 1 tous, 2 connectés, 3 partiellement connectés, 4 non connectés

get.description: Return one product's full detail from the Tillin catalog.

post.description:
Upload local/captured images to a product (proxied to Tillin storage).

The browser posts the raw image bytes here; the backend forwards them to
Tillin's bulk endpoint (multipart), which imports each into Xano storage and
appends a `product_image` row. The Xano token never reaches the browser.

Every file goes through `prepare_upload` first: Tillin silently drops what
it cannot decode (200 with `images: []`), so the real format is detected
here, HEIC is converted, and the name always carries the right extension.

Deterministic pipeline, async (download + segment + Pillow ≈ seconds).

Same 202 + BackgroundTask + polling contract as generate-model — the
studio launches several normalizations in parallel. The Photoroom
dependency resolves BEFORE any write: a missing key is a clean 503 with
no zombie asset.

Generative pipeline, 202 + asset id (FASHN takes 10-55 s).

The FASHN dependency resolves BEFORE any row is written: a missing key is
a clean 503 with no zombie asset. The BackgroundTask polls FASHN, downloads
the outputs to staging and settles the asset with its own DB session.

get.description: Product ids with at least one asset to review (catalog row badge).
Status + preview URLs of one imaging operation (poll target).
Stream one staged preview file (404 when absent or already purged).

post.description:
Recompose the output locally (reposition / new options) — no provider.

Rebuilds from the staged cutout (or the source when the cutout was
skipped), overwrites the output file and bumps `render_rev` so preview
URLs bust their caches. Synchronous: pure Pillow, sub-second.

Push the staged results to Tillin (bulk upload) and purge the staging.

`replace=true` also deactivates the original `product_image` row when the
asset knows it (source_product_image_id). Saving twice is a 409.

get.description: Return every Tillin brand with its reference websites, sorted by name.

put.description: Replace a brand's reference website URLs in Tillin.

get.description: Brands, categories, seasons, suppliers and tags for the search filters.

post.description:
Create a job, enqueue its items, and kick off processing in the
background (the response returns at once; the worker drains after).
Requeue a job's failed/rejected items and kick the worker.

get.description: List a job's items, optionally filtered by status (review queue).

post.description:
Upload one or more supplier files and start extracting in the background.

Several files are supported so documents that cross-reference the same
purchase order (e.g. a PDF order + a barcode spreadsheet) are extracted and
reconciled in one pass. An optional `profile_id` selects the render profile
at creation time (validated for ownership).

get.description:
Stream an original uploaded file (inline, for preview or download).

`index` selects which of the import's files to stream (default 0).

First rows of a tabular source file; PDFs are previewed via /file.

`index` selects which of the import's files to preview (default 0).
List the products staged by an import (review queue).

patch.description:
One-shot include/exclude of many items (« tout transférer/écarter »).

Atomic single UPDATE: only the job's items whose current status is
editable (ready_for_review/rejected) are touched — applied/failed items
are silently skipped, exactly like the per-item PATCH would refuse them.
Review edit: correct a staged payload and/or reject/restore the item.

put.description: Select (or clear, with null) the profile used to render this import.
Select (or clear, with null) the Tillin location targeted by this import.

get.description: JSON preview of the Tillin import CSV (same rows as the download).
Download the rendered Tillin import CSV.

post.description:
Render the CSV and push it to a Tillin location (`/product_import`).

Every kept (non-rejected, non-failed) item is marked `applied` and the
transfer facts are recorded on the job.

Align local statuses with what actually exists in Tillin.

Rattrapage du transfert perdu : quand `/product_import` dépasse le
timeout, Tillin finit souvent l'import alors que la réponse est perdue —
les items restent « à vérifier » ici et le transfert n'est pas enregistré.
Chaque item encore transférable est recherché dans Tillin par référence :
trouvé → `applied` + lien produit ; introuvable → inchangé (il repartira
dans un prochain transfert, qui ne rend que les items non `applied`).

Resolve applied items to Tillin product ids by `reference_code`.

`/product_import` returns no ids, so after a transfer each applied item is
linked back by searching its `supplier_ref` and matching the product whose
`reference_code` equals it (strip + case-insensitive). Idempotent: already
linked items are only counted, unresolved refs land in `not_found`.

get.description:
Per-import products view, built from the staged payloads (local only).

Rejected/failed items are excluded. The linked/unlinked counters cover the
`applied` items only — they are the ones expected to exist in Tillin.

patch.description:
Harmonize shared conventions (season, title template, color split)
across several profiles at once — catalogue-wide settings in practice.

Every id must belong to the caller's account (404 otherwise, nothing
written); fields left to None are untouched on every profile.

get.description: Return the Tillin-owned locations (no third-party), sorted by title.
Fetch the item's current Tillin product (before/after review context).

post.description: Manually resolve an item from a chosen source page and re-stage it.
Requeue one item for a full re-generation and kick the worker.

Normalize (or revert) one staged image, chosen by the reviewer.

The batch stages original source images; each one is normalized on demand
here (Photoroom, metered on the item's job). The Photoroom dependency
resolves first: missing key = clean 503, nothing written.
Write an approved item's staged enrichment back to Tillin (Xano).

get.description: Headline numbers for the dashboard KPI row.
The signed-in user's UI preferences (defaults filled in).
The account's enrichment defaults (defaults filled in).
Whether the Tillin/Xano integration is configured (never any secret).
The account's instruction library, sorted by name.

Monthly consumption per (provider, model, metric), priced at read time.

Non-admin callers get the white-label view: neutral service labels,
billable amounts only (no models, no raw cost, no coefficient).
Monthly consumption grouped by job; white-label view for non-admins.

post.description:
Re-freeze a billed month with the CURRENT price grid + coefficient.

Safety net for the case where a price was missing at closing time: once
corrected, POST here to (re)generate the snapshot. Refuses months that are
not yet billed (400 not_frozen) — a current/future month must stay live.

get.description: Daily billable series of the caller's account (see _build_timeseries).
Balance, packs and the month's movements for the caller's account.
Daily credits consumed by the caller's account.
Every account with its user count and latest activity.
Per-account monthly monitoring: cost vs billable (margin), volumes.

Every (provider, model, metric) combo the app has actually recorded.

Source of truth for the pricing form's metric picker: prices created from
this list always match real events (free-text metrics caused silent
"unpriced" gaps). `priced` resolves against the caller's grid with the
same exact-then-model-null fallback as the billing code.

Daily billable series summed over ALL accounts (operator monitoring).

Amounts are billable (cost × each account's own coefficient), so the
total curve matches what the overview bills across the customer base.
Daily billable series of ONE account (full operator view).
FULL (non-redacted) monthly summary of one account.
FULL (non-redacted) per-job breakdown of one account.
Latest jobs and imports of one account (monitoring feed).

The GLOBAL operator settings (credit grid, packs, quota, minutes).

Read from the default account — PUT keeps every account in sync, so any
account is representative.

put.description:
Write the operator settings to EVERY account (global policy).

Only the operator-owned keys are touched — each account keeps its own
client-facing settings (templates, imaging defaults…).

get.description: Daily credits consumed by ONE account (operator chart view).
One account's credit balance + last ledger entries (all kinds).

post.description:
Record a manual ledger entry (grant / pack purchase / adjustment).

`credits` is signed: a negative adjustment removes credits. Pack purchases
are bookkept here by the operator — no online payment in this scope.

get.description: One account's settings, operator view (all fields).

put.description:
Operator write of one account's settings (incl. admin-only fields:
billing coefficient, dashboard time-saved minutes).

AdminAccountSummary.title: AdminAccountSummary
AdminAccountSummary.description: One row of the accounts list.

AdminActivityEntry.title: AdminActivityEntry
AdminActivityEntry.description: One recent job/import of an account (monitoring feed).

AdminCredits.title: AdminCredits
AdminCredits.description: Admin view of one account's credits: balance + recent ledger.

AdminOverviewLine.title: AdminOverviewLine
AdminOverviewLine.description: Per-account monthly monitoring line (money as decimal strings).

AdminUsageMetric.title: AdminUsageMetric
AdminUsageMetric.description:
One (provider, model, metric) combo actually recorded by the app.

Feeds the pricing page: the metric picker offers only real combos, and
`priced=False` rows surface as "consumption without a price" alerts.

AssetSaveResult.title: AssetSaveResult
AssetSaveResult.description: Outcome of pushing a completed asset to Tillin (Xano bulk upload).

Brand.title: Brand
Brand.description: The brand a product belongs to, with its source website(s).

BrandPublic.title: BrandPublic
BrandPublic.description: A Tillin brand with its reference website URLs.

BrandWebsiteUrlsUpdate.title: BrandWebsiteUrlsUpdate
BrandWebsiteUrlsUpdate.description: Replace a brand's reference website URLs.

CatalogFilters.title: CatalogFilters
CatalogFilters.description: Classification lists backing the product-search filters.

credits.title: Credits
credits.description: Signed amount: positive credits, negative debits

CreditGrantRequest.title: CreditGrantRequest
CreditGrantRequest.description: Manual ledger entry recorded by the operator (grant/purchase/fix).

CreditOverview.title: CreditOverview
CreditOverview.description: Client view: balance, thresholds, packs and the month's movements.

CreditPack.title: CreditPack
CreditPack.description: One purchasable credit pack shown on the client usage page.

CropBox.title: CropBox
CropBox.description:
Recadrage du canevas composé, en pixels canevas (verrouillé au ratio
côté UI pour que la sortie garde les proportions du format).

DashboardStats.title: DashboardStats
DashboardStats.description:
Account-scoped headline numbers for the dashboard.

Server-side exact counters (the frontend previously approximated some of
these from the first page of paginated lists).

ExampleResponse.title: ExampleResponse
ExampleResponse.description: Response payload returned by the example endpoint.

FilterOption.title: FilterOption
FilterOption.description: One selectable value in a search filter (brand, category, …).

GenerateModelOptions.title: GenerateModelOptions
GenerateModelOptions.description:
Options of POST /products/{id}/images/generate-model (FASHN).

The instruction is resolved server-side: explicit `prompt` wins, else it
is composed from framing/scene/instructions — each falling back to the
account's generation settings. (Without a prompt FASHN picks a free
environment — confirmed live: outdoor scene.)

HealthResponse.title: HealthResponse
HealthResponse.description: Response returned by the healthcheck endpoint.

ImageAssetPublic.title: ImageAssetPublic
ImageAssetPublic.description: One imaging operation: status + provenance + staged previews.

ImportItemUpdate.title: ImportItemUpdate
ImportItemUpdate.description: Review edits: a corrected payload and/or a reject/restore status.

ImportItemsBulkUpdate.title: ImportItemsBulkUpdate
ImportItemsBulkUpdate.description:
PATCH /imports/{id}/items body — one-shot include/exclude of many items.

Powers « tout transférer / tout écarter » in one request instead of one
PATCH per item (atomic, and fast on 100+ product imports).

ImportJobTotals.title: ImportJobTotals
ImportJobTotals.description:
Aggregates over every extracted variant (a missing quantity counts
as 1 unit; amounts are quantity x unit price, None when no price at all).

ImportLocationSelection.title: ImportLocationSelection
ImportLocationSelection.description: PUT /imports/{id}/location body — null clears the selection.

ImportProductLine.title: ImportProductLine
ImportProductLine.description: One row of the « Par import » products view (local data only).

ImportProfileConfig-Input.title: ImportProfileConfig
ImportProfileConfig-Input.description: Frozen convention shapes; every field has a safe default.

ImportProfileConfig-Output.title: ImportProfileConfig
ImportProfileConfig-Output.description: Frozen convention shapes; every field has a safe default.

ImportProfileSelection.title: ImportProfileSelection
ImportProfileSelection.description: PUT /imports/{id}/profile body — null clears the selection.

ImportProfilesBulkUpdate.title: ImportProfilesBulkUpdate
ImportProfilesBulkUpdate.description:
Harmonize the catalogue-wide conventions across several profiles.

Only the fields that behave the same for the whole catalogue are
bulk-editable; None = leave that field untouched on every profile.

ImportReconcileResult.title: ImportReconcileResult
ImportReconcileResult.description:
POST /imports/{id}/reconcile outcome (lost-transfer recovery).

Each still-transferable item is looked up in Tillin by reference:
found → marked `applied` + linked; not found → left as-is.

ImportRenderPreview.title: ImportRenderPreview
ImportRenderPreview.description: JSON preview of the rendered Tillin import CSV.

ImportTransferRequest.title: ImportTransferRequest
ImportTransferRequest.description:
POST /imports/{id}/transfer body.

A null location falls back to the job's selected location
(config_json["location_id"]); missing both is a 400 `location_required`.

ImportedProduct-Input.title: ImportedProduct
ImportedProduct-Input.description: One product (a supplier reference) with its extracted variants.

ImportedProduct-Output.title: ImportedProduct
ImportedProduct-Output.description: One product (a supplier reference) with its extracted variants.

ImportedVariant-Input.title: ImportedVariant
ImportedVariant-Input.description: One sellable variant (one size of one color), one CSV row later.

ImportedVariant-Output.title: ImportedVariant
ImportedVariant-Output.description: One sellable variant (one size of one color), one CSV row later.

ItemImageNormalizeRequest.title: ItemImageNormalizeRequest
ItemImageNormalizeRequest.description: Per-image review action: normalize one staged image (or revert it).

ItemResolveRequest.title: ItemResolveRequest
ItemResolveRequest.description:
Manually point an item at a specific source product page.

Any http(s) URL is accepted since the Firecrawl fallback: non-Shopify
pages go through LLM extraction (the old validator required a Shopify
`/products/` URL and would have blocked e.g. salomon.com in the review).

JobSelection.title: JobSelection
JobSelection.description: Product selection: explicit Tillin ids or a tag (exactly one).

LocationPublic.title: LocationPublic
LocationPublic.description: A Tillin boutique location a CSV import can be transferred to.

LoginRequest.title: LoginRequest
LoginRequest.description: Credentials submitted to the login endpoint.

NormalizeOptions.title: NormalizeOptions
NormalizeOptions.description:
Options of POST /products/{id}/images/normalize (segment + Pillow).

Every treatment is à la carte: cutout (the only billed step), solid
background, canvas ratio, centering, export format and compression.

OperatorSettings.title: OperatorSettings
OperatorSettings.description:
Operator-owned settings managed GLOBALLY (admin console, one form).

Written to every account so per-account values never diverge — the app is
single-tenant today, and the pricing/consumption policy is the operator's,
not the client's. The legacy billing_coefficient is deliberately absent
(superseded by the credit model; it stays at its stored value).

PendingImagingProducts.title: PendingImagingProducts
PendingImagingProducts.description: Products with at least one completed, unsaved asset (catalog badge).

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Canonical product as consumed by the enrichment/intake engine.

ProductImage.title: ProductImage
ProductImage.description: An image associated with a product.

ProductImagesUploadResult.title: ProductImagesUploadResult
ProductImagesUploadResult.description: Outcome of uploading images to a product: the newly created images.

ProductVariant.title: ProductVariant
ProductVariant.description: A single sellable variant (style x color x size) of a product.

RenderRequest.title: RenderRequest
RenderRequest.description:
POST /imaging/assets/{id}/render body — local Pillow recompose.

Offsets are canvas pixels, scale multiplies the fitted size. Any other
field left to None keeps the option the asset was produced with.

StagedFilePublic.title: StagedFilePublic
StagedFilePublic.description: Metadata of one staged OUTPUT file (weight/dimensions display).

UserPreferences.title: UserPreferences
UserPreferences.description:
Per-user UI preferences (stored on user.preferences_json).

Unknown keys in storage are ignored; missing keys take these defaults.

VersionResponse.title: VersionResponse
VersionResponse.description: Response exposing the running application version metadata.
